name: Fanna 20x24 Porch Shed Plan - A Rustic Retreat with Classic Gable Roof & Covered Outdoor Space
open_features: Expansive 480 sq ft layout combined with a traditional peaked roof for superior drainage, added ceiling height, and classic symmetry.
A functional porch extension provides shaded entry, decorative charm, staging space for tools or plants, and a cozy outdoor seating area.
Built using conventional framing techniques and straightforward gable roof construction, making it accessible for experienced DIYers and professional builders alike.
Spacious, unobstructed floor plan allows for flexible customization - add workbenches, storage systems, office partitions, or recreational build-outs.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Fanna Gable Shed with Porch - a spacious 20x24 backyard structure designed for durability, flexibility, and timeless architectural appeal. Featuring a classic gable roofline and an inviting covered front porch, Fanna delivers an impressive 480 square feet of interior space with the charm of a small cabin and the functionality of a high-capacity workshop.
